description: Cerebro evaluation gold standard. Labels relevant DOCUMENTS (not just QA pairs) per question, plus permission (ACL) and cross-lingual cases. Built early (plan §13 / critique P1) so retrieval/chunking/model changes are gated, not guessed. Cross-lingual cases require a real multilingual embedding model and are reported separately under the fake provider.
